name: 弯刀（★） | 渐变大理石
descriptionEn: A modern homage to a falchion sword, this clip point blade has a curved edge. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated in three colors. The blade is made of many colors, but soon it all looks red
descriptionZh: 一把向弯剑致以现代敬意的匕首，它的刀刃是弯曲的。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了三层颜色的糖衣。 刺刀见虹，刺刀见红
